title: September 16th, 2022
body:
like a body does lyrics

my inner child is wild
not from my trials
it's just the way the world is
we follow the waters
cuz our thirst is a killer
discover the coast or the mountain
now our kingdom is centered
and the pendulum's swinging
the wobbles real or imagined
reveal the baggage we bring in
troubles roil the river
the bubbles give us our futures
we could float like the foam
let go our walls and go home
press our faces up close to our neighbors windows and hope
that there's more to be seen
and it'll save us to scope and maneuver
but the truth is it won't
cuz we ain't in that boat
this ain't a raft it's a rumor
and you don't have to get on this one
but don't wait for the king's ship
it'll be here way later than sooner
and you'll still need a bigger craft to escape the consumer
get rid of all that and it's wavey
hakuna matata to the end of your days
be a daisy
be a flower child
powered by the sun when it's out
diggin down when it's down
break through the dirt to root in the earth
even though you know it's all dust at the end of the day
love is a tender that way
marry marry even though they're quite contrary
cuz gardens grow where we tarry
and i can barely cope when i stop caring what happens
that's when i get caught staring
won't know if i'm brave enough to make the jump if i stop daring
so i hop here and there, wherever there's air in the room
sometimes i close my eyes when i do it
preparing to leap at the edge of erything ah new and go through it
like a body does
dancin when there's rhythm
bounce i don't fit in
time moves, the world makes music, i listen
bit off a bit, chew it, i'm remixin
like a body does
the words go through it
so i admit it's me spittin
but that's not enough to explain the precision
the way my feet keep hittin the road
i couldn't see from my previous position
see i don't got a believer's disposition
so i don't receive a dispensation i can live with taking when it ain't given
